overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from narrow neon-lit alleys through open plazas to busy streets. The footage showcases high-quality game engine graphics with vibrant neon lighting and detailed urban architecture reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

illuminated vending machine with colorful display

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alleyway illuminated by intense red neon lighting. A white bench and vending machine line the sides while debris litters the concrete floor. The camera moves forward toward a distant figure in a yellow jacket, with an overhead bridge structure visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway descending to lower plaza level

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor and beginning descent down concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: descending the concrete stairs toward the lower level plaza with green neon lights visible ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading downward to lower level
large green industrial ventilation pipes along the right wall
large illuminated green CCM corporate sign visible at the bottom of stairs
row of vending machines along the left wall of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairway transitioning from the red-lit corridor to a lower level. Industrial pipes line the right wall while vending machines appear on the left. The green CCM sign becomes visible ahead as the space opens up, marking the transition to the plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with large digital signage and neon pillars

events.description: turning right while crossing the open plaza toward the blue-lit structures

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza, turning right while passing other pedestrians and neon installations

person carrying an umbrella walking along the left side

entered.detail: building facade illuminated with bright blue neon lighting
tall pillars wrapped with zigzag neon light patterns
benches with glowing neon lighting underneath
dark entrance to a covered walkway ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by the large green CCM sign and vibrant blue neon structures. The camera turns right while navigating around pedestrians, passing illuminated benches and neon pillars. The environment transitions from enclosed to open-air with tall buildings surrounding the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with commercial advertisements

events.description: entering the covered commercial walkway with the Delamain sign visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered commercial corridor toward the street exit, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in blue pants standing near the wall looking at a device

entered.detail: large black sign with white Delamain corporate logo and text
enclosed walkway with roof and red-painted structural walls
Japanese-style gate structure with red lanterns at the corridor exit
red paper lanterns hanging from the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered commercial walkway marked by the prominent Delamain sign on the right wall. The corridor features red structural walls and digital advertisements. Ahead, a traditional Japanese-style gate with red lanterns marks the transition toward the street exit, while a few pedestrians move through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street intersection with moving traffic

events.description: approaching the street intersection with futuristic vehicles passing by

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the street intersection, waiting as futuristic vehicles pass through

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide asphalt street with marked crosswalks and traffic lines
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and lighting
elevated highway or monorail track crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway onto a futuristic street intersection. The scene features tall neon-lit skyscrapers, an overhead bridge structure, and marked crosswalks. A futuristic vehicle drives through the intersection as the camera approaches the crossing, transitioning from pedestrian zones to active traffic areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, red-lit alleyway into a sprawling, neon-drenched futuristic city center. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor of red neon and concrete debris toward a distant figure, before descending a concrete stairway lined with industrial pipes. As the camera reaches the bottom, the enclosed space opens into a wide plaza dominated by a glowing green CCM sign and vibrant blue structures, where the view expands to reveal towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts into a covered commercial walkway featuring red walls and digital advertisements, passing under a traditional Japanese-style gate with red lanterns. Finally, the camera emerges from the walkway onto a busy street intersection, moving from the pedestrian zones toward active traffic and futuristic vehicles beneath a canopy of neon skyscrapers.
